operators.label: Not equals
operators.description: Property does not equal this value.

operators.label: In list
operators.description: Property value is one of the values in a JSON array.
operators.hintLine: Value must be a JSON array of allowed scalars.

operators.label: Not in list
operators.description: Property value is not in the JSON array.

operators.label: List includes
operators.description: List/array property contains this value. Not substring search on a string.
operators.hintLine: List/array property must contain this value — not substring search on a string.

operators.label: List excludes
operators.description: List/array property does not contain this value.
operators.hintLine: List property must not contain this value.

operators.label: Text includes
operators.description: String must contain this plain text (saved as =~ with escaped text).
operators.hintLine: Plain substring on a string; stored as =~ with escaped text.

operators.label: Text excludes
operators.description: String must not contain this plain text (saved as !~).
operators.hintLine: Plain text must not appear in the string; stored as !~.

operators.label: Text matches pattern
operators.description: String property matches this regex. For plain substring use Text includes.
operators.hintLine: Regex on a string; for simple text prefer “text includes”.

operators.label: Text does not match pattern
operators.description: String property does not match this regex.
operators.hintLine: Regex must not match; for simple exclusion prefer “text excludes”.
